subject: Fleet insurance renewal — Nov 1
snippet: Ashley, your fleet policy renews November 1. Premium holds at $3,200/mo with the same liab...
body: Ashley, your fleet policy renews November 1. Premium holds at $3,200/mo with the same liability limits. I'll send the binder via Box for your signature next week. Any vehicle changes to report?

subject: Re: Fleet insurance renewal — Nov 1
snippet: Thanks Sandra. No fleet changes — still 8 Camrys and 4 Pacificas. Send the binder and I'll...
body: Thanks Sandra. No fleet changes — still 8 Camrys and 4 Pacificas. Send the binder and I'll sign after a read-through. Confirm the medical-transport rider question for the two modified vans.

subject: AHCA medical transport — application checklist
snippet: Max — pulling together the AHCA application for January 25. Need the 2025 P&L and the two-...
body: Max — pulling together the AHCA application for January 25. Need the 2025 P&L and the two-van modification budget ($4K each) reflected for the break-even. Can you confirm the entity docs are current?

subject: Re: AHCA medical transport — application checklist
snippet: Entity docs are current. I'll attach the 2025 P&L and a clean balance sheet by Friday. The...
body: Entity docs are current. I'll attach the 2025 P&L and a clean balance sheet by Friday. The 14-month break-even math checks out at current shuttle volume.

subject: Deacon board — Thursday agenda
snippet: Sister Ward — agenda for Thursday's board: benevolence fund requests, Christmas Eve servic...
body: Sister Ward — agenda for Thursday's board: benevolence fund requests, Christmas Eve service logistics, and the youth ministry classroom update. 6:30 PM in the fellowship hall.

subject: Re: Deacon board — Thursday agenda
snippet: Got it, Linda. Add the parking ministry rotation — we were short two Sundays last month. I...
body: Got it, Linda. Add the parking ministry rotation — we were short two Sundays last month. I'll bring the benevolence numbers.

subject: Palmetto Health shuttle — October billing
snippet: Ashley, October shuttle invoice received. One ride on the 14th shows a duplicate charge — ...
body: Ashley, October shuttle invoice received. One ride on the 14th shows a duplicate charge — can your team confirm? Otherwise approved for payment.

subject: Re: Palmetto Health shuttle — October billing
snippet: Frank's checking the dispatch log now. If it's a duplicate I'll credit it on the November ...
body: Frank's checking the dispatch log now. If it's a duplicate I'll credit it on the November invoice. Thank you for catching it.

subject: Endocrinology — A1C results
snippet: Ms. Ward, Dr. Larson reviewed your labs. A1C is 7.2, slightly above target. Continue metfo...
body: Ms. Ward, Dr. Larson reviewed your labs. A1C is 7.2, slightly above target. Continue metformin 1000mg twice daily and keep up the morning walks. Follow-up in 3 months.

subject: Re: Endocrinology — A1C results
snippet: Thank you. I'll keep the walks consistent and watch the evening carbs. Please book the 3-m...
body: Thank you. I'll keep the walks consistent and watch the evening carbs. Please book the 3-month follow-up around a weekday morning before dispatch.

subject: MIA airport queue — expanded slots request
snippet: To the MIA Ground Transportation office — Ward Taxi requests review of our queue slot allo...
body: To the MIA Ground Transportation office — Ward Taxi requests review of our queue slot allocation given consistent fill rates this quarter. Happy to provide ridership data. — Ashley Ward, Ward Taxi & Car Service LLC

subject: Biltmore Hotel — contract amendment
snippet: Hi Ashley, we'd like to add late-night airport runs to the Ward Taxi agreement for the hol...
body: Hi Ashley, we'd like to add late-night airport runs to the Ward Taxi agreement for the holiday season. Sending the amendment via DocuSign today.

subject: Re: Biltmore Hotel — contract amendment
snippet: Happy to cover the holiday runs. I'll review and sign in DocuSign once I confirm overtime ...
body: Happy to cover the holiday runs. I'll review and sign in DocuSign once I confirm overtime driver coverage with Frank.

subject: Parts order — Camry brake pads
snippet: Ashley, the brake pads for the three Camrys are in. JP can pick up today or I can ship. Ac...
body: Ashley, the brake pads for the three Camrys are in. JP can pick up today or I can ship. Account total is $214.

subject: Re: Parts order — Camry brake pads
snippet: JP will swing by this afternoon. Put it on the fleet account. Thanks Hector.
body: JP will swing by this afternoon. Put it on the fleet account. Thanks Hector.

subject: Family lunch Sunday
snippet: Mom, JP and I are both coming Sunday after service. Want me to grab anything from Publix o...
body: Mom, JP and I are both coming Sunday after service. Want me to grab anything from Publix on the way?

subject: Re: Family lunch Sunday
snippet: Just the plantains and a bag of rice. Soup's already on. Grandma's been asking about you.
body: Just the plantains and a bag of rice. Soup's already on. Grandma's been asking about you.

subject: DeVille restoration — headliner kit
snippet: Your 1978 DeVille headliner kit and trim clips have shipped via FedEx. Tracking attached. ...
body: Your 1978 DeVille headliner kit and trim clips have shipped via FedEx. Tracking attached. Color: maroon to match your interior.

subject: Re: DeVille restoration — headliner kit
snippet: Perfect, thank you. No rush — this one's a slow project. I'll get to it after the fuel pum...
body: Perfect, thank you. No rush — this one's a slow project. I'll get to it after the fuel pump's settled in.

subject: Samsara GPS — January renewal
snippet: Ashley, your fleet GPS renews in January at $85 per vehicle per month across 12 vehicles. ...
body: Ashley, your fleet GPS renews in January at $85 per vehicle per month across 12 vehicles. Multi-year options attached.

subject: Re: Samsara GPS — January renewal
snippet: Hold the $85 rate we negotiated. No multi-year — month to month suits the fleet better wit...
body: Hold the $85 rate we negotiated. No multi-year — month to month suits the fleet better with the medical-transport changes coming.

subject: Q4 estimated tax
snippet: Ashley — Q4 estimate is due January 15. Based on the fleet P&L I have it at roughly $9,400...
body: Ashley — Q4 estimate is due January 15. Based on the fleet P&L I have it at roughly $9,400. I'll finalize once December closes.

subject: Re: Q4 estimated tax
snippet: Thank you Max. Pull it from the business reserve as usual. Let's review before you file.
body: Thank you Max. Pull it from the business reserve as usual. Let's review before you file.

subject: Action needed: Year 1 fleet data for medical transport review
snippet: Ashley, to keep your AHCA medical transport review on track we need the Year 1 fleet financials and the full driver roster forwarded today...
body: Ashley, to keep your AHCA medical transport review on track we need the Year 1 fleet financials and the full driver roster forwarded today. Please reply with the driver names, license numbers, hourly rates, and the fleet P&L so the funding review does not stall. This is time sensitive.
